items.title: France's Socialists hold onto power in major cities in election boost for mainstream
items.dek: Paris and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns.
items.body: Paris and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Why is Israel targeting Lebanon's bridges?
items.dek: Israeli forces have been instructed to destroy the crossings over the Litani river that were being used by Hezbollah to send reinforcements.
items.body: Israeli forces have been instructed to destroy the crossings over the Litani river that were being used by Hezbollah to send reinforcements.
items.author: IriLine Desk
